## 📋 Axiom Driven Engineering Workflow

1. **Define Axioms** — Establish project principles via constitution
2. **Create Specifications** — Use Spec-Kit to define features
3. **Plan Implementation** — Generate technical plans
4. **Break Down Tasks** — Create atomic work items
5. **Execute (RED→GREEN)** — Test-first implementation
6. **Verify** — Confirm spec compliance
7. **Analyze** — Post-implementation review

---

## 🏗️ Repository Standards

All First ADE repositories MUST include:

- [ ] `CONSTITUTION.md` — Project axioms subset
- [ ] `.specify/` — Spec-Kit configuration
- [ ] `docs/adr/` — Architecture Decision Records
- [ ] `.gemini.md` / `.claude.md` — AI context files
- [ ] CI/CD workflows — Automated testing

---

- All PRs require review before merge
